360 J3C J3C_CHEST_PAIN (J3C) Chest Pain while Doing Usual Activities CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - chest pain during usual activities in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
361 J3D J3D_HEADACHE (J3D) Headache CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - headache in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
362 J3E J3E_HIP_PAIN (J3E) Hip Pain CHAR 1 Health conditions: pain symptoms - hip pain in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
